channel.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário

item.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário
item.description:
🚨 Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica
Visão geral:
• 2 com severidade Crítica
• 7 com severidade Alta
• 7 novas CVEs
• 0 novos advisories/exploits

────────────────────────────────────
Infraestrutura - Docker / ESX / Elastic / Grafana / Nginx / VMware / Zabbix

🚨 CVE-2026-58053 - Docker
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: Docker
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 9.9
Resumo:
Gitea act_runner with the Docker backend (through act 0.262.0) passes a workflow's container.options string to the Docker job container's HostConfig and, when configured with privileged: false, forces only the Privileged flag off while merging options such as --pid=host, --cap-add, and --security-opt unchanged. A user who can run a workflow on a Docker-backed runner can create a job container with host namespaces and...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-58053
 
📰 VMware Cloud Foundation® 9.1 徹底解説！Distributed Transit Gateway (DTGW) と VNA がもたらす新たなネットワークアーキテクチャ
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: 9.1
Resumo:
A notícia está relacionada a ESX no contexto de segurança da informação, com potencial relevância para monitoramento, prevenção ou resposta.
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/vmware-japan/2026/06/dtgw-vna.html
 
📰 VMware Cloud Foundation Named a G2 Leader in IaaS for Summer 2026!
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia está relacionada a ESX no contexto de segurança da informação, com potencial relevância para monitoramento, prevenção ou resposta.
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/06/29/vmware-cloud-foundation-named-a-g2-leader-in-iaas-for-summer-2026/
 
────────────────────────────────────
Segurança - Acronis / Axur / Check Point / Harmony SASE / Qualys / SentinelOne

🚨 Hackers now exploit critical Oracle E-Business flaw in attacks
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Attackers have begun exploiting a critical vulnerability (CVE-2026-46817) in the Oracle E-Business Suite (EBS) financial application, according to threat intelligence company Defused.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/new-oracle-e-business-suite-flaw-now-exploited-in-attacks/
 
🚨 Critical SimpleHelp flaw exploited to deploy new stealer malware
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Hackers are exploiting a recently disclosed critical vulnerability (CVE-2026-48558) in SimpleHelp to deploy Djinn Stealer, a previously undocumented cross-platform information stealer targeting Windows, macOS, and Linux.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/hackers-exploit-critical-simplehelp-flaw-deploy-new-djinn-infostealer-taskweaver-malware/
 
🚨 CVE-2026-53325 - Check Point
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Check Point
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: agp/amd64: Fix broken error propagation in agp_amd64_probe() A NULL pointer dereference was observed in the AMD64 AGP driver when running in a virtualized environment (e.g. qemu/kvm) without a physical AMD northbridge. The crash occurs in amd64_fetch_size() when attempting to dereference the pointer returned by node_to_amd_nb(0). The root cause of th...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-53325
 
🚨 Public PoC Released for Critical libssh2 CVE-2026-55200 Client-Side SSH Flaw
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 1.1
Resumo:
A public proof-of-concept is now out for CVE-2026-55200, a critical flaw in libssh2 that lets a malicious or compromised SSH server trigger memory corruption on a connecting client, with possible code execution. The bug affects every release up to and including 1.11.1 and carries a CVSS 4.0 score of 9.2. libssh2 is a client-side SSH library, not a server.
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/06/public-poc-released-for-critical.html
 
📰 ⚡ Weekly Recap: Linux Kernel Flaws, AI Malware Tricks, Turla Backdoor, Infostealers and More
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
This week was a reminder that attackers do not always need big tricks. One small mistake, one old access path, one missed patch, and suddenly the door is open. Forums are talking, researchers are finding easy cracks, and defenders have more cleanup waiting. ⚡ Threat of the Week New DirtyClone Linux Kernel Flaw Lets Local
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/06/weekly-recap-linux-kernel-flaws-ai.html
 
📰 Webinar: Why business email compromise attacks keep succeeding
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Business email compromise attacks increasingly rely on convincing impersonation rather than malware, making them harder for employees and traditional email defenses to detect. This webinar explores how behavioral AI can help identify sophisticated email threats and automate response workflows.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/webinar-why-business-email-compromise-attacks-keep-succeeding/
 
────────────────────────────────────
Sistemas / Cloud - 1Password / Azure / Office / Ubuntu / Windows Server / WordPress

🚨 CVE-2026-8095 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 8.1
Resumo:
The Frontend File Manager Plugin plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Authenticated Arbitrary File Deletion in versions up to and including 23.6. This is due to a case-sensitive bypass of the wpfm_dir_path parameter sanitization in the wpfm_file_meta_update AJAX handler, where supplying WPFM_DIR_PATH in uppercase evades the unset check and is normalized to wpfm_dir_path by sanitize_key() during update_post_meta(), a...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-8095
 
🚨 CVE-2026-58057 - Windows Server
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Windows Server
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 5.0
Resumo:
Flowise before 3.1.3 validates Custom MCP stdio environment variables against a denylist using a case-sensitive comparison, so on Windows, where environment names are case-insensitive, supplying 'node_options' bypasses the NODE_OPTIONS denylist entry. An authenticated user who can configure a Custom MCP node can thereby inject NODE_OPTIONS --require and execute arbitrary code in the Flowise server context.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-58057
 
📰 Microsoft 365 Apps Security Update Fixes High-Severity Excel RCE Vulnerability - cyberpress.org
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia trata de uma falha de execução remota de código relacionada a Office, com potencial impacto importante em ambientes expostos ou mal segmentados.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiakFVX3lxTE5wVGZhbFVhYjhpUVRuc3lubkRCaWU4VV9oNUJzSjBvY2lkOGZLcXlOZ25HWVhONUZ1eFVLc0NiczA1LTRDYzNxdzhCdEpUWTJoM0NPQlZrMV8xS2hMb0M1ZTRFOFRPbkt2c2c?oc=5
 
📰 Microsoft 365 Apps RCE Vulnerability Lets Attackers Execute Code via Malicious Excel Files - gbhackers.com
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia trata de uma falha de execução remota de código relacionada a Office, com potencial impacto importante em ambientes expostos ou mal segmentados.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMia0FVX3lxTFBMd0ZVN1ZaR01CSmNVYkh1bEVPdUlmeXdBaUhJTVFXZDNpY1ZuZVk0NFZQWnlTMF9pWXFNQUpFZHdMQVRSRXBtd1BhVlVLNEh5a2ZMTE9vQ0dKeFp0SjZtaWZxNHBMekxDa2tz?oc=5
 
📰 Microsoft keeps Windows Server 2022 hotpatching alive into 2027 - The Register
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Windows Server
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia aborda atualização ou correção de segurança associada a Windows Server, o que pode exigir validação e aplicação no ambiente.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiuwFBVV95cUxOcUN4SkMtMWdpX1dwLXNPSDRKdFhyYVZRWTBDdkIxZ2ZFa094bGdhcWc5VWhCdm5oSE9tZHVDdVBQSnoyRmZ2bkxoeURzZnF4MWNjN0ZQS3FkeXpCZmVOTVQyM2MzQl9JU3lObV80X1F0ZUNvNEhGdXloSHAzTVhWZnpIRFZTRHpVN3VwcnRZdEZFalN3czJCcVBpU09nRmxILTN4aHRreE1IV2NQSVBVdE5HLWpjbjRkUTdV?oc=5
 
────────────────────────────────────
Período: Notícias do período de 27/06/2026 até 29/06/2026.
